descriptions: Sacramento Hells Angels charter founded by former Hell Bent for Glory members.
edges.evidence_quote: A North Sacramento charter was established in 1956, followed by another charter in Sacramento the following year, which was formed by two brothers, James "Mother" Miles and Pat Miles, who were former members of the Hell Bent for Glory biker club.

116th Street Crew.description: The 116th Street Crew is a faction of the Genovese crime family based in East Harlem, Manhattan. Founded in the 1890s by the Morello crime family, it was originally known as the 116th Street Mob. The crew engaged in racketeering, murder, extortion, illegal gambling, loansharking, and bookmaking. It absorbed former members of the East Harlem Purple Gang in the late 1970s and early 1980s.

descriptions: The Bonanno crime family is listed as an ally of the 116th Street Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno , Colombo , Gambino , Lucchese , Purple Gang

descriptions: The Camorra assassinated the head of the Morello gang.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1916 the Camorra had assassinated Nicholas Morello, head of the Morello gang.

descriptions: Morello initially allied with Gallucci (Camorra) but later fought the Camorra in the Mafia-Camorra War.
edges.evidence_quote: The Morellos had an alliance with Giosue Gallucci, a prominent East Harlem businessman and Camorrista ... The fight over Gallucci's rackets became known as the Mafia-Camorra War.

descriptions: The Colombo crime family is listed as an ally of the 116th Street Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno , Colombo , Gambino , Lucchese , Purple Gang

descriptions: D'Aquila ordered the murders of Morello and Lupo.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1920, both Morello and Lupo were released from prison and Brooklyn Mafia boss Salvatore D'Aquila ordered their murders.

descriptions: The East Harlem Purple Gang is listed as an ally of the 116th Street Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno , Colombo , Gambino , Lucchese , Purple Gang

descriptions: The 116th Street Crew absorbed former members of the East Harlem Purple Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: By the late 1970s and early 1980s, the 116th Street Crew had absorbed and initiated many former members of the vicious East Harlem Purple Gang

descriptions: The Gambino crime family is listed as an ally of the 116th Street Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno , Colombo , Gambino , Lucchese , Purple Gang

descriptions: The 116th Street Crew is a faction (sub-unit) of the Genovese crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The 116th Street Crew , also known as the Uptown Crew , is a faction of the Genovese crime family .

descriptions: The Lucchese crime family is listed as an ally of the 116th Street Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno , Colombo , Gambino , Lucchese , Purple Gang

descriptions: Morello and Lupo were allies and united through marriage.
edges.evidence_quote: One of Giuseppe Morello's strongest allies was Ignazio "the Wolf" Lupo, a mobster who controlled Manhattan's Little Italy. In 1903, Lupo married Morello's half-sister, uniting both organizations.

descriptions: Masseria fought for control of the Morello family.
edges.evidence_quote: This is when Giuseppe "Joe" Masseria and Umberto Valenti, an enforcer working for Salvatore D'Aquila, began to fight for control of the Morello family.

descriptions: The Morello crime family founded the 116th Street Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Founders: Morello crime family

descriptions: D'Aquila allied with the Morello gang to fight the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1916 the Camorra had assassinated Nicholas Morello, head of the Morello gang. In response, D'Aquila allied with the Morellos to fight the Camorra.

descriptions: Remnants of the Purple Gang became part of the Genovese family's 116th Street Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: its remnants or former members became part of the Genovese family's 116th Street Crew

descriptions: The 116th Street Crew is a crew operating under the Genovese family.
edges.evidence_quote: 116th Street Crew operates in Upper Manhattan and The Bronx.

descriptions: Genovese family originated from the Morello gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Genovese crime family originated from the Morello gang of East Harlem, the first Mafia family in New York City.

Loomis Gang.description: The Loomis Gang was a family of outlaws operating in Central New York during the mid-19th century. Founded by George Washington Loomis Sr. and his wife Rhoda Mallet, the gang specialized in horse theft, livestock rustling, counterfeiting, and burglary. They expanded into a multi-state syndicate under Wash Loomis in the 1840s, buying protection from authorities and cultivating local goodwill to avoid prosecution.

La Familia Michoacana.description: Mexican drug cartel and organized crime syndicate based in Michoacán, founded in the 1980s by Carlos Rosales Mendoza. Known for producing large amounts of methamphetamine. Originally allied with the Gulf Cartel and Los Zetas, it split off in 2006. After the death of leader Nazario Moreno González, several factions split to form the Knights Templar Cartel and La Nueva Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: Barrio 18 is allied with La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: The Beltrán-Leyva Organization fought against La Familia Cartel as part of a larger conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In February 2010, the Beltrán Leyva Cartel and Los Zetas engaged in a violent turf war against the new alliance integrated by the Gulf Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Cartel in the border city of Reynosa, Tamaulipas, rendering some border towns 'ghost towns'.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Familia Michoacana, Gulf Cartel, MS-13, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel fought against La Familia Michoacana as part of an alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: En febrero de 2010, el Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva y Los Zetas entablaron una violenta guerra territorial contra la nueva alianza integrada por el Cártel del Golfo, Cártel de Sinaloa y el Cártel de La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Infobox lists La Familia Michoacana as an enemy of CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Grupo Flechas, Cártel del Noreste, Cártel de Guasave, Cártel Nueva Plaza, Guerreros Unidos, Artistas Asesinos, Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima, La Familia Michoacana, Los Caballeros Templarios, Los Talibanes, Unión Tepito, Cártel de los Soles, Los Choneros

descriptions: CJNG has prolonged confrontations with La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: En el ámbito territorial, el CJNG ha mantenido enfrentamientos prolongados con diversos grupos, entre ellos La Familia Michoacana y Los Caballeros Templarios, así como con la alianza conocida como Cárteles Unidos, formada por múltiples células locales para contener su expansión.

descriptions: CJNG fights La Familia Michoacana in Michoacán and Guerrero.
edges.evidence_quote: The CJNG are fighting ... La Familia Michoacana for the states of Michoacán and Guerrero

descriptions: CJNG is in conflict with La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: The CJNG are fighting ... La Familia Michoacana for the states of Michoacán and Guerrero

descriptions: CJNG is in conflict with La Familia Michoacana in Michoacán and Guerrero.
edges.evidence_quote: The CJNG are fighting ... La Familia Michoacana for the states of Michoacán and Guerrero

descriptions: Los Rojos fought La Familia Michoacana over territory.
edges.evidence_quote: Las autoridades confirmaron que la causa del enfrentamiento fue por disputa de territorio entre Los Rojos y células pertenecientes a La Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: Los Rojos fought La Familia Michoacana over territory in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: The authorities confirmed that the cause of the confrontation was due to a dispute over territory between Los Rojos and cells belonging to La Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is listed as an ally of Cártel de Tláhuac in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: CJNG , Fuerza Anti-Unión , La Familia Michoacana , Células delictivas locales y de menor importancia como La Ronda 88 y Los Guerreros

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is listed as an enemy of the Cártel del Noreste in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Chapitos , Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación , Los Metros , Cártel de Caborca , Los Ciclones , Cártel de Juárez , La Familia Michoacana , Zetas Vieja Escuela

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana supported La Resistencia against Los Zetas and Beltrán-Leyva.
edges.evidence_quote: They were also supported by the local Michoacán cartel La Familia Michoacana to fight against Los Zetas and the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana was a founding member of Cárteles Unidos.
edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos ... composed of well-trained gunmen from ... La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is a member organization of Cárteles Unidos.
edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos, conocido inicialmente como La Resistencia, es una organización criminal mexicana compuesta por miembros del ... La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is listed as an enemy of Fuerza Anti-Unión in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Infobox lists La Familia Michoacana as an enemy of Guerreros Unidos.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Gobierno de México, Ejército Mexicano, Armada de México, Cártel de Sinaloa, Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación, Cartel del Golfo, La Familia Michoacana, Los Viagras, EPR.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Guerreros Unidos split from La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: El grupo fue formado en el año 2010 a raíz de la desaparición del Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva y una escisión de La Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is a rival of the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Gulf Cartel allied with La Familia Michoacana to fight Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: the Gulf organization joined forces with its former rivals, the Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana, aiming to take out Los Zetas.

descriptions: Gulf Cartel and La Familia Cartel are aligned in the same faction.
edges.evidence_quote: the other faction integrated by the Gulf Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel, La Familia Cartel (now extinct) and the Knights Templar Cartel.

descriptions: Gulf Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel, and La Familia Cartel are aligned in the other faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Since February 2010, the major Mexican cartels have again aligned in two factions, one integrated by the Juárez Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Los Zetas and the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel ; the other faction integrated by the Gulf Cartel , Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Cartel .

descriptions: Gulf Cartel allied with La Familia Michoacana against Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: When the hostilities began, the Cartel joined forces with its former rivals, the Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana, aiming to take out Los Zetas.

descriptions: Cártel del Golfo allied with La Familia Michoacana to fight Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: Se dice que en ciudad Reynosa, el Cártel del Golfo se alió en su momento con La Familia Michoacana para combatir al grupo de Los Zetas.

descriptions: A split occurred: part of La Familia Michoacana formed Knights Templar, leading to conflict between the two.
edges.evidence_quote: A large part of La Familia Michoacana left with them to form the Knights Templar group, while José de Jesús Méndez Vargas kept the leadership of the then greatly diminished 'Familia Michoacana', starting a fight for the control of Michoacán.

descriptions: Infobox lists La Familia Michoacana as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Juarez Cartel, MS-13, Los Zetas, Independent Civilian vigilante and Militia groups, Gente Nueva, La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Caballeros Templarios was in conflict with La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: Durante el auge de la organización, especialistas señalaron que la movilización de los Caballeros Templarios se podía comparar a una insurgencia , sobre todo durante su ofensiva contra Los Zetas , La Familia Michoacana o los grupos de Autodefensa.

descriptions: Knights Templar Cartel was formed from remnants of La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: The Knights Templar Cartel ... was a Mexican criminal organization originally composed of the remnants of La Familia Michoacana drug cartel

descriptions: Knights Templar Cartel took control of La Familia Michoacana's operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Before its collapse, the cartel took full control of the now defunct La Familia Michoacana operations

descriptions: Caballeros Templarios split from La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: Anunciaron públicamente su aparición en marzo del 2011, escindiendo de La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Caballeros Templarios splintered from La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: Anunciaron públicamente su aparición en marzo del 2011, escindiendo de La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: La Familia has a strong rivalry with the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: La Familia has a strong rivalry with both Los Zetas and the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel

descriptions: Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva was in the opposing faction to La Familia Michoacana in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: Uno estaba compuesto por el Cártel de Juárez , el Cártel de Tijuana , Los Zetas y el Cártel de Beltrán Leyva .

edges.evidence_quote: A partir del 2019, el Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación (CJNG) se ha sumado a los enemigos de La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: CJNG is listed as an enemy in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación

descriptions: CJNG supported Johnny Hurtado Olascoaga in taking control of La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: Johnny Hurtado Olascoaga "El Pescado" asumió el control de la organización y consumó su venganza gracias al apoyo de "El Mencho" y el CJNG.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana has a truce with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: La Familia Michoacana has a truce with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel

descriptions: Los Rojos are listed as an enemy in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Rojos

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana allied with Cártel del Golfo to expel Familia Valencia.
edges.evidence_quote: En los años 1990, la organización se alió con el Cártel del Golfo para expulsar a la Familia Valencia.

descriptions: La Familia has connections with the Flores Camargo cartel.

descriptions: La Familia was formerly allied with the Gulf Cartel as part of Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: Formerly allied to the Gulf Cartel —as part of Los Zetas —it split off in 2006.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana was formerly allied with the Gulf Cartel as part of Los Zetas.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana allied with Cártel del Golfo in the 1990s to expel Familia Valencia.
edges.evidence_quote: En los años 1990, la organización se alió con el Cártel del Golfo para expulsar a la Familia Valencia.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana was in the same faction as Cártel del Golfo in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: La otra facción estaba compuesta por el Cártel del Golfo , el Cártel de Sinaloa y La Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana allied with remnants of Los Caballeros Templarios to fight CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: La Familia Michoacana se ha visto obligada a aliarse con Los Viagras y los reductos de Los Caballeros Templarios, para hacer frente al CJNG.

descriptions: Knights Templar Cartel was created by former members of La Familia Michoacana after its disintegration.
edges.evidence_quote: When power vacuum occurred La Familia Michoacana fell into infighting and disintegrated, its former members created the Knights Templar Cartel.

descriptions: Knights Templar Cartel is a splinter group formed from La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: Several leaders split off after his death to form the Knights Templar Cartel and La Nueva Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: Knights Templar Cartel was formed by former leaders of La Familia Michoacana after a split.
edges.evidence_quote: This led the former leaders of La Familia Michoacana, Plancarte and Gomez, to form the Knights Templar cartel

edges.evidence_quote: Cártel de los Caballeros Templarios que nació con los reductos de la Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Los Caballeros Templarios are a splinter group that emerged from La Familia Michoacana in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: En 2011 La Familia Michoacana se fracturó en dos frentes, uno que conservó el mismo nombre, La Familia Michoacana, encabezado por José de Jesús Méndez Vargas, "El Chango Méndez" y el que se autodenominó Los Caballeros Templarios

descriptions: La Nueva Familia Michoacana is a splinter group formed after the death of Nazario Moreno.

descriptions: La Nueva Familia Michoacana formed as a splinter group from La Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: La Nueva Familia Michoacana is a splinter group of La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: La organización se formó como un grupo escindido en 2011 después de que la original La Familia Michoacana perdió su poder

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is a national enemy of La Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: their biggest enemies are the Jalisco New Generation Cartel ( CJNG ), the Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Unión Tepito considers La Familia Michoacana an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: La Familia Cartel is listed as a rival of Los Negros in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, Gulf Cartel, MS-13, La Familia Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel, Los Zetas

descriptions: Infobox lists La Familia Michoacana as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Los Viagras originated as dissidents from La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: disidentes de Los Caballeros Templarios y la Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana was created to oust Los Zetas from Michoacán.
edges.evidence_quote: When the criminal groups known as Los Zetas took over the streets of Michoacán from the previously dominant criminal groups in this state, a local criminal gang La Familia Michoacana was created to oust them and to take back control of the area.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana was allied with the Gulf Cartel and Sinaloa Cartel against Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: Following the conflict with the Gulf Cartel, Los Zetas joined forces with the Beltrán Leyva Cartel (who was simultaneously separating from the Sinaloa Cartel) as well as the Juarez Cartel and Tijuana Cartel or Arellano Félix organization, to counteract the alliance of the Gulf Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana cartels.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana became enemies of Los Zetas after the 2008 grenade attack.
edges.evidence_quote: forjó una enorme enemistad contra el grupo de Los Zetas

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is listed as an ally of Mara Salvatrucha in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Sureños , Cártel de Sinaloa , Cártel del Golfo , Tren de Aragua , La Familia Michoacana , Mafia mexicana y Los Zetas .

descriptions: La Familia and MOD cooperated in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: The cartel La Familia smuggled millions of dollars' worth of methamphetamine from Mexico to Minnesota. The drugs then went through a local member of the cartel and the Menace of Destruction gang.

descriptions: The infobox lists La Familia Michoacana as an enemy of the Milenio Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: La Resistencia, Los Zetas, La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Remnants of the Milenio Cartel reached a working agreement with La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: reached a working agreement with La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Gulf Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel, and La Familia Cartel are aligned in the other faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Since February 2010, the major Mexican cartels have again aligned in two factions, one integrated by the Juárez Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Los Zetas and the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel ; the other faction integrated by the Gulf Cartel , Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Cartel .

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel allied with La Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana allied against Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: When the hostilities began, the Cartel joined forces with its former rivals, the Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana, aiming to take out Los Zetas.

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana were allied with the Gulf Cartel against Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: The complexity and territorial advantage of Los Zetas forced the Gulf Cartel to seek an alliance with the Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: international alliances are thought to include ... La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Sinaloa was allied with La Familia Michoacana in the 2010 alignment.

descriptions: El Cártel de Sinaloa se alió con La Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: The Costantino were allied with the Gallico faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Per la prima fazione erano presenti anche i Frisina, i Mazzullo, i, Gramuglia e i Costantino

Knights Templar Cartel.description: Mexican drug cartel that emerged in Michoacán in March 2011 as a splinter group from La Familia Michoacana. Known for its pseudo-religious ideology, it engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and other crimes. The cartel gained significant social influence and de facto control in some municipalities. It was designated as a Specially Designated Narcotics Trafficker by the U.S. Treasury in 2013.

descriptions: The Knights Templar Cartel is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Mazatlecos, Los Zetas, Juarez Cartel, Independent Cartel of Acapulco, Knights Templar Cartel, Barrio Azteca, Tijuana Cartel, La Línea

descriptions: CJNG has prolonged confrontations with Los Caballeros Templarios.
edges.evidence_quote: En el ámbito territorial, el CJNG ha mantenido enfrentamientos prolongados con diversos grupos, entre ellos La Familia Michoacana y Los Caballeros Templarios, así como con la alianza conocida como Cárteles Unidos, formada por múltiples células locales para contener su expansión.

descriptions: CJNG fights Knights Templar Cartel.

descriptions: CJNG is in conflict with Knights Templar Cartel.

'Ndrina Muto.description: The 'Ndrina Muto is a criminal organization of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cetraro, Calabria, Italy. It is involved in the tourism sector, the fish market, drug trafficking, and has ties to illegal waste disposal. The group has been active since at least the late 1970s and has been implicated in several murders and criminal operations.

descriptions: Muto is connected to Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Perseverance" contro i Sarcone e i Muto, collegati con i Grande Aracri

descriptions: Muto is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La ''ndrina Muto è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Muto and Chirillo cooperated in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 2 dicembre 2010 l'operazione ... hanno permesso di arrestare oltre 70 persone riconducibili ai Muto e ai Chirillo per traffico internazionale di droga

descriptions: Muto allied with the Pino-Sena faction.
edges.evidence_quote: con i Pino-Sena invece i Muto di Cetraro , i Basile-Calvano di San Lucido e i Cirillo.

descriptions: The Muto allied with the Pino-Sena during the faida.
edges.evidence_quote: con i Pino-Sena invece i Muto di Cetraro

descriptions: Piromalli and Muto were involved together in rigged public works contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 gennaio 2017 si conclude l'operazione Cumbertazione che porta al sequestro di 54 imprese e 34 imprenditori riconducibili ai Piromalli, ai Muto nella figura di Angelina Corsanto, moglie di Franco Muto e ai Lanzino-Ruà

descriptions: The Muto allied with the Pino-Sena during the faida.

descriptions: Suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Muto.
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ... ai Muto di Cetraro

descriptions: 13th Tribe patched over to become Hells Angels chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: In December 1984, the 13th Tribe biker club in Halifax, Nova Scotia led by David 'Wolf' Carroll 'patched over' to become the first Hells Angels chapter in Atlantic Canada.

descriptions: 13th Tribe MC is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

Mungiki.description: Mungiki is a banned ethnic organization in Kenya, originating in the late 1980s among Kikuyu youth. It promotes a return to traditional Kikuyu customs and resistance to Westernization, and has been involved in ethnic violence, anti-government resistance, and criminal activities such as protection racketeering. The group is secretive and operates through a cell structure, with a reported peak membership of 500,000. It was banned by the Kenyan government.

descriptions: Taliban and Mungiki are main opponents.
edges.evidence_quote: Their main opponents are the Mungiki of the Kikuyu tribe.

descriptions: Remnants of Sekine-gumi and Fujita-gumi merged to form Matsuba-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: remnants of the gang came together with the remnants of another gang, the Fujita-gumi, to found a new organization called the "Matsuba-kai" in March 1953.

descriptions: Cappello has ties with Urso-Bottaro-Attanasio clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Cappello vanta legami anche con altri gruppi criminali ... clan Urso-Bottaro-Attanasio di Siracusa

descriptions: Eastside Ontario 4th street YGW shot at Northside Ontario Calaveras members.
edges.evidence_quote: In one incident in 1999, Northside Ontario Calaveras gang members were targeted in a shooting by members of Eastside Ontario 4th street YGW gang.

Miami Boys.description: The Miami Boys was a drug trafficking organization based in Liberty City, Miami, Florida, founded in 1982 by Issac Hicks and James Sawyer. Structured like organized crime with ranks and territories, it expanded into multiple cities across the South and Midwest. The gang was largely eliminated in Atlanta in 1996 and the last dealer in Jacksonville was arrested in 1999.

descriptions: The Vallelunga and Turrà were opposed to the Emanuele di Santa Caterina and their allies in the Faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: alleati dei Turrà, contrapporsi allo schieramento formato dagli Emanuele di Mongiana (intesi strazzi), agli Emanuele di Santa Caterina, ai Ciconte di Serra San Bruno e ai Nardo di Soriano

descriptions: Infobox lists Texas Aryan Brotherhood as an enemy of Aryan Circle.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Hermandad Aria de Texas

descriptions: Aryan Circle was founded as a dissident group that split from the Texas Aryan Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: El Círculo Ario fue fundado por Mark "Cowboy" Gaspard en 1985 en el Departamento Correccional de Texas como un grupo disidente de la Hermandad Aria de Texas (ABT).

descriptions: 18th Street formed after being rejected by Clanton 14, leading to a lasting rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The two gangs have been bitter rivals ever since.

descriptions: Barrio 18 split from Clanton 14 and became bitter rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Originalmente formaban parte de Clanton 14, pero querían formar una 'camarilla' separada llamada Clanton 18th Street y permitir a los inmigrantes la oportunidad de unirse. Esta propuesta fue rechazada por el Clanton 14, lo que condujo a la formación de la pandilla de la calle 18. Las dos pandillas han sido rivales acérrimos desde entonces.

descriptions: GAS Gang was formed from the merger of Y28s and Tiny OC.
edges.evidence_quote: This convinced members of Y28s and Tiny OC that they needed to unite together as one, leading to GAS Gang being created.

descriptions: Y28s formed from former members of PDC Brats, a subset of PDC.
edges.evidence_quote: Various independent gangs emerged from this splintering, such as the Muslim Boys ... and Y28s ... the latter of which was formed by former members of the PDC Brats

descriptions: Y28s and Tiny OC united to form GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Y28s and Tiny OC had formed a rivalry with Peckham-based gangs, and at one point gang members were caught unarmed by Peckham gang members, leading to one of their members being stabbed. This convinced members of Y28s and Tiny OC that they needed to unite together as one, leading to GAS Gang being created.

descriptions: Y28s and Tiny OC merged to form GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Y28s would later join up with Tiny OC to form GAS Gang.

descriptions: National Resistance Front is a non-state opponent of the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state opponents ... National Resistance Front

descriptions: Vozdovac clan member killed Ljuba Zemunac gang leader.
edges.evidence_quote: Ljubomir Magaš ... was killed by ... Goran Vuković 'Majmun', a member of the Vozdovac clan

Armenian Power.description: Armenian Power is a US-based criminal organization of Armenian origin in Los Angeles County, California. Founded in 1989 by Armen Petrosyan, it is involved in drug trafficking, murder, assault, fraud, identity theft, illegal gambling, kidnapping, extortion, and robbery. The group has strong ties with Russian organized crime and has around 250-750 members. It remains active as of the present.

descriptions: Barrio 18 is an enemy of AP-13.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... AP-13

edges.evidence_quote: one sub-commander of the Raqqa Hawks Brigade, Abu Yamen al-Meko, ... declared his loyalty to Bashar al-Assad and formed the pro-government unit 'Tajamou al-Shamal'.

descriptions: Villa Road is a splinter group from GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Another split-off occurred around Brixton Road, with a group of GAS Gang youngers forming a new group called Villa Road.

descriptions: YPS is the successor of the PKK's youth wing.
edges.evidence_quote: The Civil Protections Units (YPS) is the successor of the Patriotic Revolutionary Youth Movement (YDG-H), the youth wing of the PKK.

descriptions: White Fence has territorial conflicts with Tiny Boys X3.
edges.evidence_quote: White Fence has pushed itself into many territory-based beefs ... engaging in territorial beefs with neighborhoods like Tiny Boys X3 (TBS), KAMSTERS X3 (KAM), Armernian Power X3 (APX3), and many other gangs
